'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=glROKX755a4ZtO.5avGj4W8.wfI80j.rScBfOAGNLg4-1775682034-1.0.1.1-gkFjPDBkKdY._d_mLDzUkjO6_nArJceSG.aytLoZyag"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
